summary: Tested new driver management features added Jan 2026: Drivers Map, Drivers Performance, Driver Shortage Alert settings, and WebSocket connection. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend tabs working correctly. Fixed critical WebSocket authentication issue.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop

action_items: Add unique 'key' prop to list items in DriversPerformanceTab component
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: WebSocket was using SECRET_KEY instead of JWT_SECRET - changed in /app/backend/routes/websocket.py line 17
context_for_next_testing_agent: New driver features fully tested and working. WebSocket connection now works after JWT_SECRET fix. DriversMapTab shows drivers on map with status. DriversPerformanceTab shows driver statistics. DriverShortageAlertSettings in SettingsTab allows configuring shortage notifications.

websocket_connection.fix_applied: Changed SECRET_KEY to JWT_SECRET in websocket.py
websocket_connection.test_result: WebSocket connects successfully, joins user room and admins room

features: Summary stats (total drivers, completed orders, avg time, avg rating, total earnings)
Select monitored cities with driver count display

backend_api_test_results.GET /api/settings/driver-shortage-alert: ✅ 200 - Returns settings with enabled, min_drivers, cities, cooldown
backend_api_test_results.Authorization: ✅ All admin-only endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
